ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Emergency contact name of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Emergency contact number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is active (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the employee in the system */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID that the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, manager, employee) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of role creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of role update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of department creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of department update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., Technical, Soft skills) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of skill creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of skill update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_skills" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the skill (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Expert) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Score given during the review (e.g., from 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of review creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of review update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of document creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of document update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the leave request */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., annual, sick, parental) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of leave request creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of leave request update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the attempt was successful or not */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user attempting to log in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of login attempt creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of login attempt update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose record was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the record change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of audit log creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of audit log update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user-role creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user-role update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the payroll */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., monthly, biweekly) */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of payroll creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of payroll update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental, vision) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit coverage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of benefit creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of benefit update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminations" (
  "termination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each termination record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being terminated */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of the termination */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the termination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of termination record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of termination record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("termination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)
